description:
Accounts, listing weights and payments. Dating: 11th or 12th century. Hand of ʿArūs b. Yosef. Several of the accounts deal with silk. This fragment is likely a page from the same book of accounts as the neighboring shelfmark. Requires further examination.

NB: The IIIF label for this shelfmark (ENA 2219.49) in DPUL is currently one digit off the actual value displayed in the image itself.
description_he: רשימה או טבלה ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
